# General Market Documentation Index

## Index -- Getting Started
- [Introduction](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/introduction): Protocol overview for on-chain ETFs with NAV pricing
- [Getting Started](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/getting-started): Wallet setup, network config, first trade

## Index -- Concepts
- [ITPs](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/concepts/itps): Tokenized baskets, per-share quantities, rebalancing mechanics
- [Order Lifecycle](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/concepts/order-lifecycle): BLS consensus flow from submission to settlement
- [Lending](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/concepts/lending): Morpho integration for borrowing and lending

## Index -- Guides
- [Buy & Sell](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/guides/buy-sell): Step-by-step ITP trading
- [Create an ITP](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/guides/create-itp): Deploy custom index products
- [Backtesting](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/guides/backtesting): Simulate ITP performance with historical data
- [Lending](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/guides/lending): Use ITPs as collateral in Morpho markets

## Index -- API Reference
- [API Overview](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/api/overview): Base URL, authentication, response format
- [Prices](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/api/prices): Real-time and historical asset prices
- [ITPs](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/api/itps): ITP NAV, AUM, state snapshots
- [Portfolio](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/api/portfolio): User portfolio tracking
- [Simulation](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/api/simulation): Backtesting engine
- [Morpho](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/api/morpho): Lending positions and operations

## Index -- Architecture
- [Contracts](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/architecture/contracts): Smart contract design, BLS verification, NAV model
- [Issuer Nodes](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/architecture/issuer-nodes): Rust consensus layer, BLS signing, 1-second cycles
- [Data Node](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/architecture/data-node): Price feeds, market data serving

## Index -- Reference
- [Error Codes](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/reference/error-codes): Smart contract error definitions
- [Contract Addresses](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/reference/contract-addresses): Deployment addresses per network
- [Glossary](https://generalmarket.io/docs/index/reference/glossary): Key terms and definitions

## Vision -- Getting Started
- [Introduction](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/introduction): Sealed parimutuel prediction market on Arbitrum
- [Getting Started](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/getting-started): Place your first bet in under 5 minutes

## Vision -- Concepts
- [Batches](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/concepts/batches): Batch structure, creation, lifecycle
- [Bitmaps](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/concepts/bitmaps): Big-endian encoding, sealed commitments
- [Ticks](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/concepts/ticks): Resolution cycle, outcomes, payouts
- [Resolution Types](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/concepts/resolution-types): UP_0 through FLAT_X threshold definitions
- [Balance Proofs](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/concepts/balance-proofs): BLS-signed claim flow
- [Fees](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/concepts/fees): 0.3% on profits only

## Vision -- Bot Development
- [Bot Overview](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/bots/overview): Architecture and environment setup
- [Quickstart](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/bots/quickstart): Register and run your first bot
- [Bitmap Encoding](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/bots/bitmap-encoding): Technical bit packing reference
- [Strategies](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/bots/strategies): Example trading strategies with backtest
- [Lifecycle](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/bots/lifecycle): Full poll-join-claim loop

## Vision -- API Reference
- [API Overview](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/api/overview): Base URL, authentication, common patterns
- [Batches](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/api/batches): List and query active batches
- [State](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/api/state): Batch state snapshots with player positions
- [Bitmap](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/api/bitmap): Submit bitmap to issuers
- [Balance](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/api/balance): BLS-signed balance proofs
- [Ticks](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/api/ticks): Tick history and reveal endpoints
- [Leaderboard](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/api/leaderboard): Player rankings and stats

## Vision -- Reference
- [Resolution Types](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/reference/resolution-types): Full enum reference
- [Contract Addresses](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/reference/contract-addresses): Vision on Arbitrum
- [Error Codes](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/reference/error-codes): Vision contract errors with fixes
- [Glossary](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/reference/glossary): Vision-specific terms

## Vision -- Examples
- [Examples](https://generalmarket.io/docs/vision/examples): Working code examples (bots, strategies, utilities)
